autonomy_budget.summary: The first frontline playbook healthy-path trial stayed within the bounded helper sequence and did not escalate into deeper auth or subsystem work.

delta_summary: Recorded the frontline playbook testing workflow and preserved the first healthy-path ASMS UI trial as explicit proof that the new playbook can stay shallow.
handoff_summary: ADF now records a frontline playbook testing workflow: healthy-path trial first, symptom-classification trial second, controlled shallow-fault trial third.
The first healthy-path `ASMS UI is down` trial is preserved and judged to have stayed shallow.

In the observed window, host sanity was healthy, `httpd.service`, `keycloak.service`, and `ms-metro.service` were active, listeners were present on `80`, `443`, `8080`, and `8443`, and localhost UI reachability returned `200` or the expected `302` redirect into `/algosec-ui/login`.
The playbook did not need login-bootstrap, BusinessFlow, FireFlow, AFA, broker, or database checks to make a useful decision.
The next best test is a symptom-classification trial where the customer still reports UI down even though the shallow local surfaces remain healthy.
highest_risk_observation: Highest risk remains unchanged: `canonical_state_integrity` did not run locally, so keep advisory memory separate from canonical pack state.

memory_tier.summary: Pack-local restart memory for the new frontline playbook testing workflow and its first healthy-path proof.

memory_validity.summary: Medium-confidence restart memory: the trial result is fresh and concrete, but canonical state integrity still has not passed locally.

summary_lines: Do not widen into login-bootstrap, BusinessFlow, FireFlow, AFA, broker, or database checks before the shallow host, edge, service, and first-shell path is exhausted.
Do not treat a healthy localhost path as proof of the full customer path; use it only to rule out a top-level local UI outage in the observed window.

recommended_next_action: Recommended next action: continue `validate_frontline_playbook_with_small_trial_series` with a symptom-classification trial for `ASMS UI is down` where the customer still reports UI down even though the shallow local surfaces remain healthy.
summary: This restart memory captures the new frontline playbook testing workflow and the first healthy-path ASMS UI trial that proved the rebuilt playbook can stop shallow on the observed localhost window.
